svg.text: Multi-Agent Group Chat Arena with Hybrid Speaker Selection
speaker — NOT the dictator of turn order
All roles see full conversation history
Natural Convergence Detection: 3+ silent turns (<80 chars or "agree & yield") → break
Final Synthesis: Moderator extracts best elements, resolves contradictions, outputs ONE refined idea
Implementation: Language instruction injected at the FRONT of user content
Format: "OUTPUT LANGUAGE: Chinese (中文). Every response MUST be entirely in Chinese."
Applied in: IdeaGen Arena roles, Designer, Builder, Reviewer, Deployer — every LLM call across the pipeline
In-memory event hub with JSONL persistence
Persistent Markdown reports per pipeline run
Priority: CLI flags > env vars > config file
Repeat until maxTurns (24) or natural convergence
